\section{Professional Summary}
Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET) with 3+ years of experience in \textbf{test automation}, \textbf{Python scripting}, and \textbf{OOP}-based framework design for parallel execution across multiple platforms. Proven expertise in \textbf{CI/CD pipelines}, \textbf{Linux} environments, \textbf{containerization} with Docker and Kubernetes, and Agile delivery, with demonstrated ability to rapidly adopt new programming languages and environments.
